patch.value: Fix output-corruption + demonstrate all 9 SDK capabilities correctly (typed reference)

value.author: codex
value.text: Shipped ts-starter was BROKEN: registerService('output_format') returned {format:'toon'} which hijacked EVERY command's output, plus stderr spam on every command, plus dead demos using non-existent APIs (registerHook, registerSchema). Fixed: service override -> true pass-through (return ctx.payload); renderer -> typed ctx, transforms only own ts_starter-tagged payload else null (native rendering); hooks -> real api.hooks.before/afterCommand; schema -> real registerItemFields/registerItemTypes/registerMigration; added registerExporter + registerParser; 'parser' added to manifest caps; all incidental logging gated behind PM_TS_STARTER_VERBOSE. Verified build+tsc(strict)+2/2 tests+functional: 0 activation/blocking failures, pm list renders native TOON, hello/info/exporter work. All 9 capabilities now correctly demonstrated.

patch.value: Output-corruption fixed; all 9 capabilities correctly demonstrated; verified green.
